data.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Code patterns understood (files read: plugins/dso/docs/contracts/ticket-flock-contract.md, plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib.sh, .claude/scripts/dso, plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-list.sh, plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-reducer.py, tests/scripts/test-emit-review-event.sh, tests/lib/assert.sh, tests/lib/git-fixtures.sh) ✓ Key findings: _flock_stage_commit is reusable; .suggestions/ starts with '.' so reducer already excludes it from batch; test pattern follows emit-review-event.sh structure
